projectDescription: A drop-in, open source translation widget that translates any website with a single script, powered by JigsawStack's contextual translation engine.
keyFeatures: Single-script drop-in installation for any website
Supports 100+ languages with automatic language detection
Smart localStorage caching for fast repeat translations
Fully customizable UI with CSS class overrides and theme options
Responsive design with optional automatic font size adjustment
Works with React, Next.js (App Router & Pages Router), and plain HTML
Context-aware translations powered by JigsawStack AI
publicApiSurface: TranslationWidget(publicKey: string, config?: TranslationConfig) — default export, initializes the widget
window.translate(langCode, onComplete?, onError?) — programmatically translate the page
window.resetTranslation(defaultLang, onComplete?, onError?) — reset page to original language
window.clearCache(langCodes[], onComplete?, onError?) — clear translation cache
TranslationConfig.pageLanguage — source language of the page
TranslationConfig.position — widget position: top-right | top-left | bottom-left | bottom-right
TranslationConfig.adjustFontSize — scale font size for longer translations
TranslationConfig.showUI — toggle the default widget UI on/off
